title: agave duplicata subsp. pueblensis
intro: Agave duplicata subsp. pueblensis, also known as Agave pueblensis or Puebla Century Plant, is a perennial succulent plant native to Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, making it useful in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Agave pueblensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health. The plant's medicinal properties can be harnessed through various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
